name: snapsynapse--skill-provenance
description: Version tracking for Agent Skills bundles and their associated files across sessions, surfaces, and platforms. Use when creating, editing, versioning, validating, packaging, or handing off a skill bundle; when checking or updating MANIFEST.yaml, CHANGELOG.md, hashes, stale evals, or frontmatter mode; and when keeping version identity with the bundle instead of filenames. Compatible with the agentskills.io open standard.
